bird.summary: The greater adjutant (Leptoptilos dubius) is a member of the stork family, Ciconiidae. Its genus includes the lesser adjutant of Asia and t…

relations.subject: Greater adjutant
relations.evidence: 1877]] Loss of nesting and feeding habitat through the draining of wetlands, pollution and other disturbances, together with hunting and egg collection in the past caused a large decline in the population of this species
